summary: Phase 2+2.5 full testing: Login, Inbox, Analytics, Usage & Billing, Templates, and all API endpoints. All core features working correctly.

integration_issues.issue: WebSocket connection to /api/ws/inbox fails in preview environment - non-blocking, UI still works via polling/REST

issues: Shows 'No templates' empty state (not 'Connect a WABA first') because demo WABA seed IS shown in WABA dropdown - this is the correct/expected behavior per spec notes

passed_tests: Login with owner@demo.com / Owner123! - dashboard loads
Inbox loads with 1 conversation (+15559998888) and '24 hours left' badge
Inbox 'Simulate new' button creates new conversation with toast 'New conversation created'
Inbox thread view shows messages with correct bubble layout (code: inbound=justify-start, outbound=justify-end)
Inbox service window badge shows '24 hours left'
Inbox reply composer ENABLED when service window is open
Inbox close/reopen conversation works ('Conversation closed' toast, 'Reopen' button, composer disabled with 'Service window closed')
Usage & Billing page loads with MTD spend, Last 30 days, Billable deliveries, Free deliveries stat cards
Usage & Billing CSV export button present and clickable
Usage & Billing Excel (xlsx) export button present and clickable
Analytics Messages tab loads with stat cards (Total messages=4, Delivered=4, Failed=0, Conversations=1) and timeseries chart
Analytics Usage & Cost tab shows 'No cost data yet. Data appears when messages are delivered.'
Templates page loads with Demo Business Account (Seed) in WABA dropdown
New Template button is ENABLED (not disabled) since demo WABA exists
New Template dialog opens with full component builder (name, language, category, header/body/footer/buttons, live preview)
API: POST /api/inbox/simulate-inbound returns {conversation_id, ...} - 200 OK
API: GET /api/inbox/conversations returns array with >= 1 conversation
API: GET /api/analytics/usage/cost returns {mtd_cost_usd, by_category, by_country}
API: GET /api/analytics/usage/daily returns array
API: GET /api/analytics/dashboard returns delivery_rate, read_rate, failure_rate, cost_burn_rate, throughput
API: GET /api/platform/overview returns 403 for owner@demo.com (TenantOwner not PlatformSuperAdmin)
seed_data_creation: Backend test created simulate-inbound conversations via API during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2+2.5 fully verified. Demo WABA seed (demo_waba_seed_001) + phone (demo_phone_seed_001) working. simulate-inbound creates conversations correctly. Inbox close/reopen, service window badge all working. Analytics dashboard/usage APIs return correct shapes. Platform overview correctly returns 403 for non-super-admin. WebSocket fails in preview env but non-blocking. Templates shows 'No templates' (not 'Connect WABA') because demo WABA is seeded - this is expected.
